S.FORM: == qabang == blag balay niqun. pury nya ga mutu sblaq hi na mlikuy.
S.PHON: == qaβaŋ == βlaɣ βalaj niqun. purj nja ɣa mutu s~ɕβlaq ħi na mlikuj.
